classes.EFFICIENT: delta_makespan < 0 and risk decreases and SIF is preserved or increased
classes.EFFICIENT_COM_TRADEOFF: delta_makespan < 0 and risk decreases, but SIF decreases
classes.FAST_BUT_HIGH_RISK: delta_makespan < 0 and risk does not decrease
classes.ROBUST_BUT_SLOW: delta_makespan >= 0 and risk decreases and SIF is preserved or increased

dominance_primary: makespan <=, SIF >=, relative Delay_CVaR95 <=, with at least one strict improvement
